Simple Pricing for AI Database Security

VoxCore protects databases from AI access by inspecting, validating, and auditing every AI-generated query before execution.

Starter

Best for individual developers and small AI projects

$29

per month, billed annually

  • ✓ 1 Database Connection
  • ✓ 100 AI Queries / Month
  • ✓ Basic SQL Firewall
  • ✓ Query Validation Engine
  • ✓ Email Support

14-day free trial – No credit card required

MOST POPULAR

Professional

Ideal for AI startups and production applications

$99

per month, billed annually

  • ✓ 5 Database Connections
  • ✓ Unlimited AI Queries
  • ✓ Advanced SQL Firewall
  • ✓ AI Query Inspector Dashboard
  • ✓ Query Audit Logs
  • ✓ Priority Support

Enterprise

Designed for enterprises and AI platforms

Custom

Tailored to your needs

  • ✓ Unlimited Databases
  • ✓ Unlimited Queries
  • ✓ Custom Firewall Policies
  • ✓ SSO / SAML Integration
  • ✓ Dedicated Support
  • ✓ On-Premise Deployment Option

How VoxCore Protects Your Databases

VoxCore acts as a security layer between AI systems and your databases, inspecting and validating every AI-generated SQL query before execution.

1

AI Generates Query

AI tools like OpenAI, Grok, Claude or internal agents generate SQL queries based on prompts.

2

Query Sent to VoxCore

Instead of executing directly, the query passes through VoxCore for inspection and validation.

3

Security Analysis

VoxCore analyzes the SQL for destructive patterns, injection risks, and unsafe operations.

4

Safe Execution

Safe queries are executed. Dangerous queries are blocked and logged in the audit dashboard.

Built for Modern AI Data Systems

VoxCore integrates seamlessly with leading AI models and databases.

AI Models

OpenAI • Grok • Claude • Gemini • Custom AI Agents

Databases

PostgreSQL • MySQL • SQL Server • Snowflake • BigQuery

Why Teams Trust VoxCore

🔒 AI Query Security

Block unsafe or malicious AI-generated SQL queries before execution.

⚡ Real-Time Query Inspection

Every AI query is analyzed and validated instantly.

📊 Full Audit Logging

Track and review all AI activity across your databases.

Protect Your Database From Unsafe AI Queries

AI tools can generate powerful SQL queries, but without proper safeguards they can also damage or delete critical data. VoxCore inspects every AI-generated query before it reaches your database.

⚠️ Without VoxCore

  • AI agent generates unsafe SQL
  • Accidental DELETE or DROP TABLE commands
  • Production data deleted or corrupted
  • No validation or query inspection
  • No audit trail for AI actions

Example AI Query:

DROP TABLE customers;

Database table permanently deleted.

🛡️ With VoxCore

  • AI queries inspected before execution
  • Dangerous SQL patterns detected
  • Query risk scoring engine
  • Unsafe queries automatically blocked
  • Full audit log of AI activity

Example AI Query:

DROP TABLE customers;

Query blocked: destructive SQL detected.

Frequently Asked Questions

What's included in the free trial? ▼

The free trial includes full access to VoxCore in preview mode. You can explore the UI, test the SQL firewall, and see how query governance works. Preview mode disables actual database connections.

Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime? ▼

Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

Do you offer discounts for annual billing? ▼

Yes. All prices shown are for annual billing and include a 20% discount compared to monthly plans.

What databases are supported? ▼

VoxCore currently supports Snowflake, SQL Server, and PostgreSQL. BigQuery, Redshift, and other databases are coming soon.

Is there a monthly billing option? ▼

Yes. Monthly billing is available at a 20% premium. Contact sales for details or upgrade from your dashboard.

Do you offer team features? ▼

Team features and SSO integration are available on the Enterprise plan. Contact our sales team to learn more.
